html:
The Grass Suit is the weakest wearable Armor, crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 10 Cut Grass and 2 Twigs to craft and is available from the beginning of the game.

Functioning as an alternative to the Log Suit, the Grass Suit has 225 durability and absorbs 60% of physical damage. This means a fresh Grass Suit can effectively add up to 225 for the average survivor.

It can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone. Despite being acceptable fuel for Campfires and Fire Pits, a dropped Grass Suit will not catch fire from any burning objects, Campfires, or summoned Star Caller's Staff stars.


Trivia

  • The Grass Suit was added in the The End Is Nigh update.
  • Worn Grass Suits will make the sound of rustling grass when walking.

Assets

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

Gallery

  • Grass Suit first seen in the poster for the The End is Nigh update.
  • Wilson wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Willow wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wendy wearing a Grass Suit.
  • WX-78 wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Woodie wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wes wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Maxwell wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Webber wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Walani wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Warly wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wilbur wearing a Grass Suit.

  • Wormwood wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wheeler wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Winona wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wortox wearing a Grass Suit.
  • Wurt wearing a Grass Suit.

The Grass Suit is the weakest wearable Armor, crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 10 Cut Grass and 2 Twigs to craft and is available from the beginning of the game.
Functioning as an alternative to the Log Suit, the Grass Suit has 225 durability and absorbs 60% of physical damage. This means a fresh Grass Suit can effectively add up to 225 for the average survivor.
It can also be added to a Campfire or Fire Pit for fuel, even when its durability is nearly gone. Despite being acceptable fuel for Campfires and Fire Pits, a dropped Grass Suit will not catch fire from any burning objects, Campfires, or summoned Star Caller's Staff stars.

The Grass Suit was added in the The End Is Nigh update.
Worn Grass Suits will make the sound of rustling grass when walking.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Grass Suit là loại Áo giáp yếu nhất, được chế tạo trong tab Chiến đấu. Nó cần 10 Cỏ Cắt và 2 Cành Cây để chế tạo và có sẵn ngay từ đầu trò chơi.

The '''Grass Suit''' is the weakest wearable [[Armor]], crafted in the [[Fight]] tab. It requires 10 [[Cut Grass]] and 2 [[Twigs]] to craft and is available from the beginning of the game.

Functioning as an alternative to the [[Log Suit]], the Grass Suit has 225 durability and absorbs 60% of physical damage. This means a fresh Grass Suit can effectively add up to 225 {{Hp}} for the average survivor.

It can also be added to a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]] for [[Fire#Fuel|fuel]], even when its durability is nearly gone. Despite being acceptable fuel for Campfires and Fire Pits, a dropped Grass Suit will not catch fire from any burning objects, Campfires, or summoned [[Star Caller's Staff]] stars.


== [[File:Placeholder.png|32px|link=]] Trivia ==
* The Grass Suit was added in the ''[[Version History#The End is Nigh|The End Is Nigh]]'' update.
* Worn Grass Suits will make the sound of rustling grass when walking.
